objective: Convert ITEM-0000 Full Mode Artifact DNA from candidate record into a validated canonical artifact workflow.
assumptions: ITEM is the artifact canon repository.
ABYS is responsible for converting concepts into executable task packets.
A full-mode artifact must have enough structure to become docs, schemas, examples, tests, or implementation work.

files.notes: Score candidate against ITEM canon rubric.
Create only after promotion criteria pass.
Validate candidate and canon JSON files against schemas/item-artifact.schema.json.
Run schema validation on pull requests.

implementation_steps: Create a validation script that loads every JSON file in candidates and canon.
Validate required fields, status values, routing, and canon score ranges.
Create CI workflow to run the validator.
Promote candidate to canon only after validator passes and score threshold is met.
validation: Candidate has a computed canon score of at least 7 before promotion.
risks_blockers: Current candidate format may not yet match the ITEM schema exactly.
Canon score may require human review before automatic promotion.
next_recursive_improvement: Add a generator that reads failed validation output and proposes the smallest schema-compliant patch.
routing_notes: This task packet belongs in ABYS, but its primary implementation target is ITEM.
